2603.29356.title: CIPHER: Counterfeit Image Pattern High-level Examination via Representation
2603.29356.paper_summary: The rapid progress of generative adversarial networks (GANs) and diffusion models has enabled the creation of synthetic faces that are increasingly difficult to distinguish from real images. This progress, however, has also amplified the risks of misinformation, fraud, and identity abuse, underscoring the urgent need for detectors that remain robust across diverse generative models. In this work, we introduce Counterfeit Image Pattern High-level Examination via Representation(CIPHER), a deepfake detection framework that systematically reuses and fine-tunes discriminators originally trained for image generation. By extracting scale-adaptive features from ProGAN discriminators and temporal-consistency features from diffusion models, CIPHER captures generation-agnostic artifacts that conventional detectors often overlook. Through extensive experiments across nine state-of-the-art generative models, CIPHER demonstrates superior cross-model detection performance, achieving up to 74.33% F1-score and outperforming existing ViT-based detectors by over 30% in F1-score on average. Notably, our approach maintains robust performance on challenging datasets where baseline methods fail, with up to 88% F1-score on CIFAKE compared to near-zero performance from conventional detectors. These results validate the effectiveness of discriminator reuse and cross-model fine-tuning, establishing CIPHER as a promising approach toward building more generalizable and robust deepfake detection systems in an era of rapidly evolving generative technologies.
2603.29356.paper_summary_zh: 生成對抗網絡（GANs）和擴散模型的快速進展使得合成面孔的創建變得越來越難以與真實圖像區分。 然而，這一進展也加劇了錯誤信息、詐騙和身份濫用的風險，突顯了對於在各種生成模型中仍然保持穩健的檢測器的迫切需求。 在這項工作中，我們介紹了偽造圖像模式高級檢查（CIPHER），這是一個深度偽造檢測框架，系統性地重用和微調最初為圖像生成訓練的判別器。 通過從ProGAN判別器中提取尺度自適應特徵，並從擴散模型中提取時間一致性特徵，CIPHER捕捉到生成無關的伪影，這些伪影通常被傳統檢測器忽視。 通過在九個最先進的生成模型上進行廣泛實驗，CIPHER展示了卓越的跨模型檢測性能，達到最高74.33%的F1分數，並在F1分數上平均超過30%地超越現有的基於ViT的檢測器。 值得注意的是，我們的方法在基線方法失敗的挑戰性數據集上保持穩健的性能，在CIFAKE上達到88%的F1分數，而傳統檢測器的性能接近零。 這些結果驗證了判別器重用和跨模型微調的有效性，確立了CIPHER作為在快速發展的生成技術時代中建立更具通用性和穩健性的深度偽造檢測系統的有前景的方法。
2603.29356.author: Kyeonghun Kim et.al.
2603.29356.authors: Kyeonghun Kim, Youngung Han, Seoyoung Ju, Yeonju Jean, YooHyun Kim, Minseo Choi, SuYeon Lim, Kyungtae Park, Seungwoo Baek, Sieun Hyeon, Nam-Joon Kim, Hyuk-Jae Lee
